builds.name: Solo/Duo Nightmare
builds.desc: I tested the build with many variations, and on Nightmare difficulty this proved to be the most reliable and most stable setup. While it holds its own even solo, the true potential of the abilities is especially effective in Duo. The synergy between the gear and abilities guarantees constant damage and almost indestructible survivability. - Wisp: The Wisp stays on the field for 25 seconds and, with smart alternating use in Duo, can have nearly 100% uptime, providing constant extra damage and cle
builds.author: Coner

builds.name: Ratata Minigun V8
builds.desc: Can't Stop, Won't Stop, Don't Stop
builds.author: Cat Onion

builds.name: 🌵Bandito Duo🌵Long Ranger & Bow
builds.desc: Copy Bandito with Portal, cast Fire Wisp, empower both spells with an electric Bow, and watch hordes melt away.
builds.author: Aves

builds.name: C.Q.B Speed Demon V7
builds.desc: An aggressive build for speed and close range. can be used in solo or co-op but is more designed for solo play
builds.author: Baran

builds.name: Clutch Eagle (+ BOOMrang) by Cat
builds.desc: AoE? Check. Boss-killing? Check. High value breakpoints? Also check! Most die to the blast, others to a single bodyshot, those ignited won't survive long, and anything bulky will be handled by a fully stacked Eagle. It's high time to transform your Leveredge into the ultimate generalist, well-equipped to handle any and all situations! Comes packaged with a very reactive BOOMrang that can further chain into the 2-round Clutch reload rhythm for quick-switch synergy. All 3 spells will keep you high
builds.author: catasstrophy634

builds.name: The Healer (NIGHTMARE)
builds.desc: Nightmare difficulty Voodoo healer build -Rescue and Ritual for max healing (and res) capability -Doll for clutch moments and when shit hits the fan -Sniper for spell cooldown reduction -Stars for movement and auto-healing -Jokers to potentialize healing, cooldown reduction and mobility -Bottle crate for extra spice moments.
builds.author: Cigarra

builds.name: Long Ranger (Bow)
builds.desc: Use the Portal to duplicate the Banditos and to escape when necessary. Use the Bow for AOE damage/horde clear, and to electrify-supercharge the Wisp and Banditos. Keep the Long Ranger out as much as possible to proc Focus Shot constantly. However, due to the Speedster cap being hit, the two Speedy Gonzales are considered filler slots for your personal playstyle since the build can function to its fullest without them.
builds.author: Reiner

builds.name: Clutch💥Leverdge & Dual Revolvers
builds.desc: This build revolves around keeping only two bullets in the chamber so you can constantly benefit from Clutch Joker. Leverdge reloads quickly enough to make this playstyle comfortable, and Battlemage isn't needed due to the build's short spell cooldowns. Spell combo works as follows: cast Geyser, then ignite it with a shot from Leverdge. After that, cast Bubble and finally reload your Electric Dual Revolvers to complete the combo. In co-op, I swap Drain for Rescue.
builds.author: Aves

builds.name: Aiming Burst🎯Quad Cylinder & Bow
builds.desc: Joker Aiming Burst got some interesting changes and feels really fun to play now. Acid Rain not only works great with Fire Wisp, but also has a nice synergy with the Drain spell.
builds.author: Aves

builds.name: Life Steal
builds.desc: Go in, kill. Took damage? Kill more skeletons. Spell on cool down? Kill even more skeletons. Some how dual revolvers upgrades panel stuck at boomerang's, but it's max damage, lifesteal, accuracy, draw speed and last 2 points on ammo bag.
builds.author: Clem

builds.name: [CO-OP] Minigun & Dual Revolvers
builds.desc: This build is mainly focused on CO-OP gameplay
builds.author: Aves

builds.name: [DEPRECATED] Homing Ricochet (+ Dualies) by Cat
builds.desc: Insane ammo economy and very comfortable crowd-clear by spamming first shot Homing Burst (shoot-reload-repeat) as fast as possible. Can also instantly delete most isolated targets (like Deadeyes) or nearby flying structures (floating bubbles), but full auto is always available in a pinch for focus fire during crowds or to quickly dispose of Liches. Dualies act as consistent single-target output with animation cancel (reload/inspect upon empty) and emergency healing in a pinch (Rage trigger) or w
builds.author: catasstrophy634

builds.name: Ride The Lightning
builds.desc: Cast the lightning. Ride the lightning. Become The Lightning.
builds.author: Яков Несененко

builds.name: Undead Outside
builds.desc: Stop being the dead inside, touch some grass and become UNDEAD OUTSIDE!
builds.author: Яков Несененко

builds.name: Full Coop
builds.desc: Velocidad de movimiento con Bumerang, Control de masas con Minigun y curación de equipo
builds.author: Alan Augsburger

builds.name: Spell Slinger Sniper (Sake build)
builds.desc: A bit swishy, but one-shots most enemies on very hard and below and constantly casts drain and strikes with rain to clean large groups or high-health enemies.
builds.author: DarkStar4014

builds.name: BlitzKrieg
builds.desc: A build that specializes in ripping through the hoards of cryptics up close and personal with a level of speed associated only with German Blitzkrieg
builds.author: Theodore Vaught

builds.name: Big Boots Voodoo Master GF
builds.desc: This build is for my girlfriend. Quad Cylinder with Aiming Burst Speedster for killing big spookies. Boomerang with Chonky Throw and Lucky Strike to maximize lifesteal. Hero with spell CDR and movement speed, 3 Voodoo spells for maximum support and control
builds.author: KYBDPilot

builds.name: Minigun Scaling
builds.desc: Speed caps at 110% -> Disgrace + Run & Gun = 80%. Scale through the match with Jokers. No spell cooldowns + no verticality -> Doll + Thunderstrike + Boing = escapes. Bow has 10% ammo drop chance. Thunderstrike replaceable for Rescue.
builds.author: Nathan Ohashi

builds.name: Spell Refund Sniper
builds.desc: Wisp + Rain + Electric = full clear + safety. Use liberally because spell cooldown goes quicker than you think. Wisp + Electric already near guarantees you safety, Acid just fully guarantees it. Best uses -> Landing for ammo + objectives + danger zones/hoards. Use sniper after spell combo to decrease cooldown, otherwise use bow to scale Machine Gun. Boing crucial for escaping hoards.
builds.author: Nathan Ohashi

builds.name: C.Q.B Combat Medic V3
builds.desc: My C.Q.B Speed Demon build Re-tuned for Support. Best used for Co-op.
builds.author: Baran

builds.name: Wind's Howling
builds.desc: Lambert, Lambert, what a nice guy.
builds.author: Яков Несененко

builds.name: Hyperstars
builds.desc: Main DPS Stars Build; for those that think stars are only for Mobility. Quite Flexible, Main Weapon and 3rd Spell are customizable to Preference.
builds.author: Norma's #1 Fan

builds.name: Who Do?
builds.desc: You Do Da Voodoo.
builds.author: Arcath

builds.name: The Floor Is Lava
builds.desc: Bound high in the sky while raining explosive flames at the poor skeletons with no hops. Use Minigun for healthbars and Bow + Spells for everything else.
builds.author: Garoam

builds.name: Dual Revolver Primary
builds.desc: Fast gameplay, decent dmg, single target, priority elimination build. you want your primary to be the dual revolver? say no more. my advice, you better be good at dodging
builds.author: Fnostico Aspecto

builds.name: Strike Slinger
builds.desc: Build focused on synergizing with the Strikes cantrip. The Long Ranger jokers maximize kills per shot fired, reducing spell CDs by as much as possible. The Bow clear crowds, self heals, spawns cactus Minos for further Strikes synergy, and can convert Wisp to its combo version if Strikes misses during casting. The other 2 spells combo nicely with Strikes for massive area control, and the hero jokers help reduce cooldowns further
builds.author: KYBDPilot

builds.name: The Prickly Posse
builds.desc: Let your posse do all the hard work for you. Use Long Ranger to speed up cooldowns, and Bow to boost your summons and destroy spawners from a distance.
builds.author: Garoam

builds.name: Magic Shotgunner
builds.desc: Suitable for any situation, the primary weapon boasts extremely high burst damage, capable of quickly eliminating high-threat targets; the secondary weapon is used to restore health and effectively and quickly eliminate snipers. For large groups of enemies, Rain or Thunder Strike can easily handle them, while Wisp allows you to complete missions without constantly monitoring nearby lone enemies.
builds.author: Kobato:P

builds.name: Additional Leverage (Support Build)
builds.desc: When working with a team you may notice ammo and health can be few and far between, this set is meant to do a few things. Give ammo, Give bottles, Give cover fire. Leverage is used for main damage and keeping up the pressure while the Boomerang is used a speed boost to get out and reposition if things get hot. This is my personal build when teaming with my friends and meant to serve as a baseline to start from if you use the Leverage.
builds.author: Zee (Natsuki)

builds.name: Sniper magic bullet
builds.desc: stand and sniping and catus bullet
builds.author: Kroze Wilson

builds.name: that joker important
builds.desc: try to make that joker really useful
builds.author: Kroze Wilson

builds.name: The Eliminator
builds.desc: I believe it to be the best if you are trying to go for most kills/damage. The core of this build is maximizing uptime on Rain, Wisp, and Thunderstrike, as imo those are easily the most powerful spells in the game, as they delete most mobs in seconds and the only thought you have to put into using them is maximizing efficient AOE for Rain, using wisp on cooldown, and Thunderstriking in the center of enemies with the exception of exploders. The Primary slot is facilitated by the Long Ranger with
builds.author: Valerie

builds.name: Sniper's worst nightmare?
builds.desc: Personal build I like to run when I play casually. It works on nightmare but shines better on lower difficulties. The shotgun shreds higher health mobs and does a decent job with crowds thanks to the double crits and raw damage, plus leaving minos around to catch anything left over. The akimbos are the same way with the added bonus of the NUKE combo with gyser (speedster can be swapped with ricochet for better horde clear). The only thing that can be a little annoying are Deadeyes, both the shot
builds.author: MTK_Prototype

builds.name: Very fast Leveredge
builds.desc: High damage with the Leveredge, very fast with the Stars. You run faster than a horse while using them. Boing is good for movement, Surcharge for clearing swarms, and Wallo for area denial.
builds.author: Red Racer
